reason: Open-source plugins for Claude Cowork are immediately usable, offering concrete tools for builders integrating with Anthropic's platform.
proposed_post: Anthropic released an open-source repository of knowledge-work plugins for Claude Cowork. Builders can leverage these pre-built tools or adapt their code for custom Claude integrations, accelerating development for common tasks.
source_angle: Anthropic's official open-source plugin release for Claude Cowork

reason: New open-source tool on GitHub, directly usable for code comprehension, strong community signal, integrates with AI coding assistants.
proposed_post: Lum1104/Understand-Anything is a new open-source tool that converts code into interactive knowledge graphs. Use it to explore, search, and query any codebase, integrating with Claude Code/Codex for faster comprehension and debugging.
source_angle: Open-source tool for code comprehension and AI assistant integration

claire_note:
Chloe, das hier ist interessant: Lum1104/Understand-Anything.

Das Tool verwandelt Code in interaktive Knowledge Graphs. Stell dir vor, du kannst deinen Code nicht nur lesen, sondern wie eine Wissensdatenbank durchsuchen und befragen. Das ist ein Game-Changer für Code-Reviews, Onboarding oder einfach, um komplexen Legacy-Code zu verstehen. Besonders cool ist die Integration mit Claude Code, Codex & Co. – das ist direkt nutzbar für viele Teams.
